title: SCP-093, Red Sea Object
description: Don't you dare to touch the Red Disc, or you will be hunted by large, faceless creatures in an unknown world
body:
Red Sea Object adds a new dimension. Its history comes from the SCP universe, where it is referred to as SCP-093, also known as the Red Sea Object.


Don't touch any Red Discs you find. Ignoring this advice will teleport you to a strange, flat dimension, filled with ruined cities and vast, empty fields. The cities contain valuable loot, but you’ll also encounter ghosts that vanish as you get closer. However, the real danger lies in the fields. At night, you’ll find large, faceless creatures that will relentlessly hunt you down. If you manage to defeat one, you’ll be rewarded with another Red Disk, allowing you to return to the Overworld. But will you be able to get back home, or will you be trapped in this dimension forever?

## **Updates continue on Curseforge** ##

- A mod made by Zcoper
- Mod created with MCreator!
- Requires Geckolib

● Visit my Discord Server!
[https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ](https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ)



● Important FaQ

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>



► [OLD] What is my console spaming?

Most mobs use special spawning conditions, which means that these mobs can only appear under certain conditions. If the spawning conditions work, this spam is created in the console.

► [OLD] Why can't I summon a mob?

Spawning Conditions determine which conditions must be met in order to spawn certain mobs. Some mobs only spawn above Y level 60. Some below. Most mobs can only spawn in the overworld than in other dimensions.

► Why are features missing in different versions?

It is recommended to play the newest versions of higher minecraft versions.

Not all features of MCreator available or the same in different versions.
For example: Version 1.19.2 doesn't have the feature of shield, better structure generation or custom villagers, but Version 1.20.1 does have them.

► Where does SCP-093 spawn?

SCP-093 can spawn anywhere in the overworld like a normal monster. However, there can only be one instance of SCP-093.

► How can I enter and exit the SCP-093 Dimension?

To enter SCP-093's dimension, right-click SCP-093. To escape the dimension you have to kill the Unclean, who will drop SCP-093 again, which will take you back to the spawn.

► Why do the cities look so buggy?

Due to the close generation, the cities generate inside each other which makes them look so destroyed.

</details>



![SCP-093](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0177116b31644cdcfa98169ab5484fd16581245b.png)

SCP-093 is a red disk with black symbols. Upon finding SCP-093, you can pick it up by sneaking and right-clicking. However, if you simply right-click SCP-093 or use it from your inventory, you will be teleported into SCP-093's dimension. This dimension is dark, filled with vast fields and destroyed cities. In the cities, you can find loot, but at night, new monsters may spawn in the fields. To escape the dimension, you must find another SCP-093 and use it.

 

- Config File not inculed.
- You are all allowed to use this mod in your modpacks!
- Do not port my mods without permission!
